How It Works

🎤

Record Your Voice

Simply speak your message. Sing happy birthday. Read a poem. Whatever you want.

🤖

AI Animates It

Our technology transforms your voice into a unique animated character.

🎊

Send Joy

Share the magic with family and friends. They'll never forget it.
